repo_signals: L3 smoke for hardware.verification: UVM agent driver monitor scoreboard, constrained-random, functional coverage, formal property checking, SVA, coverage closure, CDC and RDC verification
fix CSS responsive text overlap in the web UI

retrieval_query: uvm agent driver monitor scoreboard constrained random functional coverage covergroup coverpoint formal property assertion sva coverage closure cdc rdc verification

validation_smoke.name: hardware.verification L3 validation smoke
signals: functional coverage reaches the closure target with every covergroup and coverpoint exercised
the scoreboard compares actual against expected for every transaction with no unchecked outputs
formal property checks prove the safety assertions hold or return a concrete counterexample
constrained-random regressions run with seeds recorded so any failure reproduces deterministically

diagnosis_smoke.name: hardware.verification diagnosis smoke
signals: a passing test with a coverage hole means the stimulus never reached the unverified corner
a scoreboard mismatch points to either a design bug or a wrong reference model expectation
an assertion firing during simulation flags a protocol or timing rule the design violated
a formal counterexample reveals an input sequence that breaks a property the design assumed safe
an unreached coverpoint after long random runs suggests an over-constrained or unreachable stimulus condition
